findings.title: Align architecture documentation with the current implementation
findings.summary: Replace this template summary with a precise, evidence-backed mismatch.

evidence.observation: Replace with the exact documented claim.
Replace with the contradictory current implementation evidence.

recommended_actions: Update the documentation to describe the current evidence-backed architecture.
Add a durable validation or ownership mechanism that reduces recurrence.
acceptance_criteria: Every changed claim is supported by the current repository snapshot.
Historical behavior is clearly labeled or moved to versioned historical documentation.
verification: Compare the revised document with manifests, source entry points, CI, and deployment configuration.
Run the repository hygiene audit and confirm this finding no longer applies.
non_goals: Do not redesign the implementation solely to preserve stale documentation.
